title: Governed Autonomy Is Becoming the Frontier AI Stack
description: Today’s episode covers Anthropic’s Sonnet 5, Claude Science, and Fable/Mythos access shift; Google, GitHub, and Cursor’s move toward governed agent runtimes; operator patterns from Every and Latent Space; and the inference-economics layer highlighted by SemiAnalysis, Sequoia Training Data, Air Street Press, and Braintrust. The through-line is that the next six months of AI systems may be defined less by standalone chatbot scores and more by cost-controlled, permissioned, eval-driven workflow loops.
